description: §61.1 — an <endpoint> whose arm bodies reference ONLY in-scope names (the arm's positional payload bindings prompt/project + a module fn handleDispatch + literals) SHALL compile clean: no E-SCOPE-001. The acceptance sibling of endpoint-arm-body-undefined-scope — proves the arm-body scope check binds payload bindings + module declarations correctly rather than over-firing.
rationale: §61.1 / §61.2: an arm body may reference its own destructured payload bindings (§51.0.B.1) plus any module-level declaration (fns, imports) and globals. handleDispatch(prompt, project) resolves the module fn + both payload bindings, so no undeclared-identifier diagnostic fires.
